title: DCPT LET result manifest
description: Per-plan, per-code result manifest. One file per data/<code>/results/<plan>/ directory. Plan directory names are the primary cross-code alignment key; filenames inside may differ between codes.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump when the format changes incompatibly.

plan.description: Plan directory name. Must match the parent directory of this manifest. Identical across all MC codes.

name.description: Full display name of the MC code.

short.description: Short identifier matching the data/<short>/ directory name.

version.description: Code version string used for these results.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about the code configuration or known limitations.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the simulation was run, or null if unknown.

input_path.description: Relative path to the input directory used, from the repository root.

runner.description: User or system identifier that ran the simulation.

git_ref.description: Git ref or commit hash of the input state used.

n_primaries.description: Number of primary particles simulated. Strongly recommended; omit only when genuinely unknown.

normalization.description: Normalization convention for output quantities, e.g. 'per_primary'.

runtime_seconds.description: Total wallclock runtime in seconds, if known.

frame.description: Coordinate frame declaration for this code's results. Optional. Declares the code's native convention and the explicit transform to the canonical DICOM/IEC patient frame, replacing ad-hoc flips. See docs/coordinates.md.

native.description: The code's internal convention, e.g. 'mc+z' (source z=-50, travel +Z), 'mcpl-z' (source z=+50/+60, travel -Z), or 'topas-iec-y' (DICOM->IEC RotX=90, beam along world Y with RotZ 180 scoring).

to_patient.description: Human-readable description (or reference) of the explicit rigid transform mapping this code's stored results into the canonical DICOM/IEC patient frame, and the derived-depth mapping for 1D profiles. Replaces undocumented np.flip / RotZ 180 hand-reversals.

beam_model.description: Beam model used for the source, e.g. 'v2' or 'v5'. Determines the upstream source-plane distance.

source_plane_cm.description: Upstream source-plane distance from isocenter in cm (50 for v2, 60 for v5).

capabilities.description: Free-form summary of what this code can or cannot produce. Use 'notes' for a human-readable summary of limitations. Actual per-file availability is declared via output_type in outputs[*].files.

outputs.description: Output entries grouped by native output block. Each file carries an output_type referencing data/output_catalog.json. Files without a catalog counterpart (raw outputs, preview images) omit output_type.

description.description: Human-readable label for this native output block.

role.description: primary_data: direct simulation output. derived: post-processed from primary_data. raw_output: code-native format not yet page-extracted. preview_image: rendered visualization.

notes.description: Free-text notes, e.g. how derived outputs were produced or known caveats.

files.description: Files in this output block, relative to the manifest directory.

path.description: File path relative to this manifest's directory.

output_type.description: Catalog key from data/output_catalog.json identifying the physical content of this file. Format: {geometry}.{QUANTITY}.{filter}.{medium}[.vs_{diff_axis}].
